summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control iteration 12. Fixed critical syntax error in useGateway.js (duplicate export line) and added missing customSkills/customConnectors/customPlugins state initialization. All 34 requested features tested and verified working.
passed_tests: Chat: Send message creates thread with model tracking (modelId stored in thread)
Chat: Copy button appears on hover for both user and assistant messages
Chat: Stop generating button appears during AI streaming response
Chat: Markdown rendering in AI responses (bold, code blocks, lists)
Chat: Typing indicator shows during AI response streaming
Thread management: New thread button saves current thread before clearing
Thread management: Thread sidebar shows model name below thread title (e.g., 'Qwen3-Coder-480B')
Thread management: Switching threads restores correct messages AND model
Thread management: Deleting thread (X button on hover) removes it from sidebar
Model Selector: Opens with 6 providers (huggingface, ollama, opencode, opencode-go, openrouter, venice)
Model Selector: Hover reveals models panel with capabilities/context/cost badges
Model Selector: Selecting a model updates the active model state and closes dropdown
Model Selector: Model selection persists when starting a new conversation
Customize Directory: Skills tab shows 15 skill cards with /skill-name format, provider, downloads
Customize Directory: 'Add custom skill' button shows form with name/description inputs
Customize Directory: Connectors tab shows 18 connector cards with Figma 'Interactive' badge
Customize Directory: 'Add custom connector' button shows form
Customize Directory: Plugins tab shows 10 plugin cards with provider and downloads
Customize Directory: 'Add custom plugin' button shows form
Customize Directory: Search filters cards in real-time across all tabs
Customize Directory: URL parameter ?tab=connectors navigates directly to Connectors tab
Customize Directory: URL parameter ?tab=plugins navigates directly to Plugins tab
Settings: Desktop Integration toggle with badges (Mac Control, Commands, File Access)
Settings: Connected Apps tab shows 12 connectors with toggles
Settings: 'Browse all connectors in Directory' link navigates to /customize?tab=connectors
Settings: URL param ?tab=apps navigates to Connected Apps tab
Approvals: Shows pending count badge (e.g., '2 pending') with pulsing indicator
Approvals: Shows 4 approval cards with title, description, agent, risk level
Approvals: Approve/Reject buttons work and change status
Approvals: Shows 'All caught up — no pending approvals' message when all resolved
Jobs: Progress bars increment smoothly (65%→67%→68%, not oscillating)
Jobs: Cancel button cancels job and moves to History with 'Cancelled' status
Jobs: Shows '2 active' badge for running jobs count
Dashboard: Connectors stat shows correct active count (not '/6')
Dashboard: Shows Active Jobs, Pending Approvals, Connectors, Gateway stats
PlusMenu: 'Plugins' link navigates to /customize?tab=plugins
PlusMenu: 'Manage skills' navigates to /customize?tab=skills
PlusMenu: 'Manage connectors' navigates to /customize?tab=connectors
Navigation: All 9 sidebar links work correctly (Chat, Agent, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize)
fixes_applied: Removed duplicate 'executeCommand' export line (line 680) that caused syntax error
Added missing state initialization for customSkills, customConnectors, customPlugins arrays
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 34+ requested features tested and working. Key iteration 12 fixes: 1) Fixed syntax error in useGateway.js (duplicate export line). 2) Added missing customSkills/customConnectors/customPlugins state arrays. Key features verified: Chat with copy-on-hover, stop generating, markdown rendering, typing indicator. Thread management with model tracking (modelId stored per thread, shown in sidebar). Model Selector with 6 providers and hover-based models panel. Customize Directory with Skills/Connectors/Plugins tabs, search, filter, and 'Add custom' forms. Settings with Desktop Integration toggle (batch toggles mac+desktop+files) and 'Browse all connectors in Directory' link. Approvals with pending count badge and 'All caught up' empty state. Jobs with smooth progress bars (not oscillating) and cancel button. Dashboard with correct connectors count (not '/6'). PlusMenu links to /customize?tab=X. All 9 navigation links working.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), toggleConnector/toggleSkill/togglePlugin (state updates), createThread/deleteThread/setActiveThread (state updates), addCustomSkill/addCustomConnector/addCustomPlugin (state updates), all settings updates (state updates)
